properties.name: text
properties.value: We didn't raise the obelisk. We woke on the floor and it was already listening.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Nobody leaves the Fold. It isn't a rule. It's just that nobody ever has.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Rope enough to reach the light -- if you don't weigh anything anymore.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Every ship that ever sank points the same way. Up.

properties.name: text
properties.value: The line between worlds is thinner than a footstep. His fit inside mine.

properties.name: text
properties.value: The first breath burns. The second one is his name.

properties.name: text
properties.value: They walk IN. Toward the den. Why would he walk toward it?

properties.name: text
properties.value: It doesn't eat what it takes. It collects.

properties.name: text
properties.value: The music stops every time the small one cries. Then it starts again, angrier.

properties.name: text
properties.value: She doesn't hunt to kill. She hunts to keep.
